audit.note: press/close compose `Item Pressed: {0}`/`Item Closed: {0}` (+ ${$source>/title}); accept/reject/error are static control_global toasts - all roundtrip-free, so the app is init-only

deviations.what: the notifications are static (not model-bound), so onItemClose's client-side removeItem is not mirrored (close fires a toast only); onErrorPress's setProcessingMessage MessageStrip on the item is shown as a toast.
all toasts were switched to roundtrip-free client-composed control_global toasts on 2026-07-22 (the app is now init-only) - re-verify press/close/accept/reject/error each toast their text.
